title: atalantia nitida
intro: Atalantia nitida is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the citrus family. It is native to Southeast Asia and has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is known to have health benefits such as lowering blood pressure, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Atalantia nitida is often used in teas, infusions, and extracts to harness its medicinal properties, with some preparations also combining it with other herbs to enhance its effects.
